title: The Forgotten Anniversary
content: Nathan realized he had forgotten his wedding anniversary only after seeing several unread messages from his wife during the afternoon. At first, he hoped he was mistaken about the date, but a quick look at the calendar confirmed his mistake. Feeling guilty and embarrassed, Nathan left work early and rushed to buy flowers and her favorite dessert. On the way home, he rehearsed several apologies in his mind. Fortunately, his wife was upset but also amused by his panic. They spent the evening talking, laughing, and eventually ordering dinner from their favorite restaurant. Nathan promised himself he would never rely only on memory for important dates again.
